framework_alignment.alignment_scope: All 6 factors covered with trend projections and strategic implications — extends original PESTLE with geographic variation and scenario modeling
Two distinct scenarios modeled with trigger conditions and strategic implications
PESTLE informs competitive rivalry and threat of new entrants analysis

checklist_items.criterion: All 6 PESTLE factors are covered with specific, non-generic findings
checklist_items.evidence_required: Each factor must have at least 2 key_findings with specific observations, not platitudes
checklist_items.evidence_provided: Political: 3 findings (EU AI Act, US EO, China AI regs). Economic: 3 findings. Social: 3 findings. Technological: 3 findings. Legal: 3 findings. Environmental: 2 findings. All with source_refs.

checklist_items.criterion: Every finding is cited to a specific evidence source
checklist_items.evidence_required: Each finding must have a source_ref that resolves to a source_note_card or artifact
checklist_items.evidence_provided: 17/17 findings have source_refs. Sources include regulations, market reports, surveys, and domain research.

checklist_items.criterion: Trend projections exist for 6-month, 12-month, and 24-month horizons
checklist_items.evidence_required: Per factor, explicit forward-looking statements with reasoning
checklist_items.evidence_provided: All 6 factors have all 3 timeline projections. Projections grounded in evidence trends and interconnected factor analysis.

checklist_items.criterion: Factor interconnections are mapped with explicit relationships
checklist_items.evidence_required: Minimum 4 interconnections showing different relationship types
checklist_items.evidence_provided: 5 interconnections covering: causally_linked (2), mutually_reinforcing (2), counterbalancing (1). All with strength assessment.

checklist_items.criterion: Risks and opportunities are surfaced per factor — not just description
checklist_items.evidence_required: Each factor must have risks and opportunities arrays
checklist_items.evidence_provided: All 6 factors have risks + opportunities. Risks are specific and actionable. Opportunities tied to strategic implications.

checklist_items.criterion: Composite risk score and key strategic implications are actionable
checklist_items.evidence_required: Risk score with rationale. Implications that a PM can directly action on
checklist_items.evidence_provided: Composite risk score: 62. 5 key implications, each tied to specific factors and timeline projections.

checklist_items.criterion: Geographic variations modeled for relevant regions
checklist_items.evidence_required: Per region, differentiating factors and risk adjustment
checklist_items.evidence_provided: EU, US, APAC modeled with factor differences and risk adjustments.

checklist_items.evidence_required: Minimum 2 scenarios with trigger conditions and implications
checklist_items.evidence_provided: AI Regulation Overreach (possible) and LLM Commoditization (likely) — each with triggers and strategy implications.

next_action: PESTLE Analysis meets gold standard. Route to strategy phase for option generation. Schedule freshness review at TTL (90 days).
